title: Number of Pairs Satisfying Inequality
titleCn: 满足不等式的数对数目

testcases.input: nums1 = [3,2,5], nums2 = [2,2,1], diff = 1 Output: 3 Explanation: There are 3 pairs that satisfy the conditions: 1. i = 0, j = 1: 3 - 2 <= 2 - 2 + 1. Since i < j and 1 <= 1, this pair satisfies the conditions. 2. i = 0, j = 2: 3 - 5 <= 2 - 1 + 1. Since i < j and -2 <= 2, this pair satisfies the conditions. 3. i = 1, j = 2: 2 - 5 <= 2 - 1 + 1. Since i < j and -3 <= 2, this pair satisfies the conditions. Therefore, we return 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: There are 3 pairs that satisfy the conditions: 1. i = 0, j = 1: 3 - 2 <= 2 - 2 + 1. Since i < j and 1 <= 1, this pair satisfies the conditions. 2. i = 0, j = 2: 3 - 5 <= 2 - 1 + 1. Since i < j and -2 <= 2, this pair satisfies the conditions. 3. i = 1, j = 2: 2 - 5 <= 2 - 1 + 1. Since i < j and -3 <= 2, this pair satisfies the conditions. Therefore, we return 3.

testcases.input: nums1 = [3,-1], nums2 = [-2,2], diff = -1 Output: 0 Explanation: Since there does not exist any pair that satisfies the conditions, we return 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: Since there does not exist any pair that satisfies the conditions, we return 0.
